creator: aturetta@bestunion.it
text:
Jason correctly make me notice that somehow the patch I attached to
the first message has got corrupted during mail transfer.

Here is a new patch file that fixes also:

 - open-vm-tools-nox11 and open-vm-tools should CONFLICT each other

After applying the patch, pkg-plist-x11 should be removed from the
repo, and files/pkg-message.in should be added.

Thanks,
Angelo.
